config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society’s interests matter, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse, censorship, or unfair treatment of minorities. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting individual dignity first, then limiting those rights only when there is a clear and necessary public reason. I value social harmony, but not at the cost of letting the group crush the person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, pengalaman sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas nama “kepentingan umum,” hasilnya sering melanggar kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan perlindungan kelompok minoritas. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi menurut saya harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak mudah dikorbankan; kalau tidak, “demi masyarakat” bisa menjadi alasan yang terlalu mudah untuk penyalahgunaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society’s interests should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can become an excuse to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or protect the powerful. The social good matters, but it should be pursued within firm limits set by basic rights, because once individual dignity is treated as secondary, the whole society becomes less just and less trustworthy.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas nama “kepentingan umum,” kebebasan berbicara, beragama, dan perlindungan minoritas sering jadi korban. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan anggapan bahwa harmoni sosial selalu lebih penting; harmoni yang dibangun dengan menekan orang yang berbeda menurut saya bukan harmoni yang sehat, melainkan ketertiban yang rapuh. Kepentingan masyarakat memang nyata, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang kuat, karena tanpa itu “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan penyalahgunaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the idea that society should take priority over the individual in general. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand why people value harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to pressure dissenters, excuse corruption, or ignore minorities. Society does have legitimate interests, especially in emergencies or public safety, but those limits must be narrow and clearly justified, not a blank check to override basic rights. If individual dignity is treated as secondary, the result is not a stronger society but a more obedient and less just one.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, saya melihat sejarah kami berkali-kali menunjukkan bahwa ketika pemerintah atau mayoritas diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas nama “kepentingan umum,” yang paling sering terkorbankan justru kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan perlindungan minoritas. Harmoni sosial yang dibangun dengan menekan perbedaan bukan harmoni yang sehat, melainkan ketertiban yang rapuh. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi menurut saya harus tunduk pada hak dasar yang kuat, karena tanpa batas itu, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu mudah disalahgunakan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
